English: No mods match the selected filter.
Translation: No mods fit yer chosen filter.

English:
No control schemes found.

Expected:
StreamingAssets/Controls/<SchemeId>/manifest.json

Notes:
- Folders beginning with '_' are ignored.
- On Quest/Android, ensure StreamingAssets/Controls/index.json exists.
Translation:
No control charts found.

Expected:
StreamingAssets/Controls/<SchemeId>/manifest.json

Notes:
- Folders beginnin' with '*' be ignored.
- On Quest/Android, be sure StreamingAssets/Controls/index.json exists.
No crew divisions found in credits.csv.

English: No credits loaded (credits.csv contained no valid rows).
Translation: No crew ledger loaded (credits.csv held no valid rows).

English: Saved toggle for developer-facing runtime behavior.
Translation: Saved toggle fer shipwright runtime behavior.

English: Clears user settings back to defaults and resets tutorial progress.
Translation: Restores all settin's to default an' resets tutorial progress.

English:
If you encounter issues, bugs, or have feature requests,
please use the links below.

When reporting issues, include your version number and platform.
Translation:
If ye find bugs, troubles, or have ideas,
use the links below.

When reportin' troubles, include yer version an' vessel.

English: No content is available for this tab.
Translation: No cargo be available fer this tab.

English: You Have completed the tutorial! You will no longer spawn here unless a new tutorial room is added.\n\nYou may now use your menu to switch to a different level.
Translation: Ye've finished yer trainin'! Ye won't wash up here again unless a new trainin' deck be added.\n\nYe may now use yer menu t' sail to another place.

English:
The menu is used for spawning content, switching levels, and changing settings.
Open the menu to complete this tutorial chamber and activate the teleporter to the next room.
Translation:
The menu be used fer spawnin' cargo, sailin' to new waters, an' changin' settings.
Open the menu to complete this tutorial chamber an' awaken the teleporter to the next room.

English: Grab the head and move it into place. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. The head rotates and moves while the chest stays stable.
Translation: Grab the head an' move it into place. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. The head turns an' moves while the chest stays steady.

English: Position the Head to Match the Target
Translation: Match the Head to the Target

English: Grab near the hips or upper thighs to control the hip pivot. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. This moves the lower body as a single unit.
Translation: Grab near the hips or upper thighs to command the hip pivot. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. This moves the lower body as one unit.

English: Move the Hips to Match the Target
Translation: Shift Yer Hips to Match the Mark

English: Grab the hand and move it freely. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. You can also grab shoulders, elbows, and knees for finer control.
Translation: Grab the hand an' move it freely. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. Ye can also grab shoulders, elbows, an' knees fer finer control.

English: Move the Hand to Match the Target
Translation: Move Yer Hand to Match the Mark

English: Grab near the belly (ORANGE SPHERE) to move the spine. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. This moves the entire spine while the limbs adjust automatically.
Translation: Grab near the belly (ORANGE SPHERE) to move the spine. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. This moves the whole spine while the limbs adjust themselves.

English: Shift the Spine to Match the Target
Translation: Shift Yer Spine to Match the Mark

English: Hold the modifier button, then grab anywhere on the character. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. This moves the entire character at once and is useful for large adjustments.
Translation: Hold the modifier button, then grab anywhere on the character. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. This moves the whole character at once an' be useful fer large adjustments.

English: Move the Entire Body to Match the Target
Translation: Move the Whole Body to Match the Target

English: Grab the upper body (RED SPHERE) to control the torso. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. The torso can tilt and twist for more control than the hips.
Translation: Grab the upper body (RED SPHERE) to command the torso. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. The torso can tilt an' twist fer more control than the hips.

English: Rotate and Tilt the Torso to Match the Target
Translation: Rotate an' Tilt the Torso to Match the Target

English:
Hold down a joystick and move your hand to pull yourself through the world.

Use this to get into extreme positions comfortably, fast and easily. 

To unlock the teleporter, lower yourself by space shifting until you are close to the ground.
Translation:
Hold down a joystick an' move yer hand to pull yerself through the world.

Use this to reach extreme positions comfortably, quickly, an' easily.

To awaken the teleporter, lower yerself by space shiftin' until ye be close to the ground.

English:
A spawn object will place on your beam.
Use the joystick to push or pull the object, and rotate it until it matches the outline shown in the room.

When the object is aligned correctly, press the trigger to place it.
Translation:
A spawn object will appear on yer beam.
Use the joystick to push or pull the object, an' rotate it until it matches the outline shown in the room.

When the object be aligned correctly, press the trigger to place it.

English: Please tune the VR settings in this menu to be comfortable.\nThese settings can be changed at any point in the future in the settings menu.\n
Translation: Tune the VR settings in this menu until ye be comfortable.\nThese settings can be changed at any time later in the settings menu.\n

English: Grab the hand and move it freely. Complete this step by aligning the two shapes exactly. You can also grab shoulders, elbows, and knees for finer control.
Translation: Grab the hand an' move it freely. Complete this step by alignin' the two shapes exactly. Ye can also grab shoulders, elbows, an' knees fer finer control.

English: Move the Hand to Match the Target
Translation: Move Yer Hand to Match the Mark
